title: Cat's Eye Season 2
titleNative: キャッツ♥アイ 2シーズン
synopsis: Together, Hitomi, Rui and Ai are Cat’s Eye, the greatest art thieves Japan has ever known. But they don’t steal for money or fame - they do it in the hopes of finding their father, a great painter who went missing after World War II. While they’re off searching for him in Europe, a new female thief claiming to be Cat’s Eye starts wreaking havoc in Tokyo! She steals anything she can get her hands on, and her brutal methods are putting the lives of the police at risk... It’s time for the real Cat’s Eye to head back to Japan and bring her reign of terror to an end! (Source: Discotek)

title: Itou Junji: Crimson
synopsis: Crimson refers to the color crimson or bright red, and the concept of this volume is "monsters." This is a collection of horror stories that carefully selects masterpieces filled with unique madness, allowing you to immerse yourself in the eerie, bizarre, and yet original world of Junji Ito. (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: The Buried Tree Devil
synonyms: The Grave Robbers: Qinling Sacred Tree
synopsis: After returning to Hangzhou from his past two adventures in Nansha, Wu Xie suddenly receives a call from his long-lost childhood friend Lao Yang. He talks to Wu Xie about their adventure in the hinterlands of Qinling Mountain three years ago and invites Wu Xie to explore the ancient ruins there again. During their adventure, Wu Xie and Lao Yang witness a giant taimen, a grand underground waterfall, and an unfathomable ancient sacred tree. Meanwhile Zhang Qiling, who has been elusive from the start, is secretly helping Wu Xie. (Source: Tencent Animation Youtube Channel, edited)

title: Kyoshin to Hyouka no Shiro
synopsis: The story is set in Nagasaki prefecture in Minami Shimabara city, the fabled origin of the Shimabara Rebellion that sent shockwaves through all of Japan in the early Edo period. It is also where a third-year junior high school student named Shirou spends his days with his school friends. One summer day, Shirou's older childhood friend Akane returns to Minami Shimabara from Tokyo. Shirou and Akane take a stroll around Minami Shimabara with another longtime friend, Tokiya. While these friends are dealing with nostalgia and more complex feelings, a mysterious creature named Goron suddenly appears before them. This encounter with a mere little creature causes great events to unfold once more in this city... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Araiso Private High School Student Council Executive Committee
titleEnglish: Araiso Private High School Student Council Executive Committee
titleNative: 私立荒磯高等学校生徒会執行部
synopsis: Kubota Makoto and Tokitoh Minoru (characters from Kazuya Minekura's manga Wild Adaptor -- though no reference is made to the darker storyline of WA in this light-hearted anime) are the muscle of their high school's all-powerful student council. They defend the student body from disorder -- generated by both humans and demons -- while avoiding their classes. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Mirage QUEEN Prefers Circus
titleRomaji: Kaitou Queen wa Circus ga Osuki
titleNative: 怪盗クイーンはサーカスがお好き
synopsis: They always steal the prey they aim for. That is Phantom Thief Queen. Gender, age, nationality unknown. Together with their partner Joker, RD, they travel around the world on the airship Troubadour. This time, the Queen is aiming for a cursed jewel, the legendary Rose of Linden. A hypnotist, an acrobat, a magician...the talented circus members challenge the Queen! What is their purpose? In order to get back the jewel, the Queen stands up to the challenge in a bold and brilliant way (or disguise). Nothing is impossible for the Queen! (Source: HIDIVE)

title: Kindaichi Shounen no Jikenbo
synonyms: The Case Files of Young Kindaichi Movie
synopsis: Invited for a anniversary celebration, Kindaichi, Miyuki and inspector Kenmochi re-visit the Opera House. There they discover that a play of "The Phantom of the Opera" is being rehearsed again. However, it doesn't take long when members of the acting troupe are killed by the "Phantom". Kindaichi will once again have to solve a murder series in the Opera House. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleRomaji: Tezuka Osamu ga Kieta?! 20 Seiki Saigo no Kaijiken
titleNative: 手塚治虫が消えた?! 20世紀最後の怪事件
synonyms: Tezuka Osamu's Strangest Case in the 20th Century
synopsis: Tezuka Osamu who going to a 21 Century new year's party with all the charters he made. One thing leads to another and he ends up missing! It's up to his most popular charters to find out what happened to him and get him back safely before the rest of the guest show up (Souce: Kuro Hazama (a Black Jack shrine))

title: Wanpaku Tanteidan
synopsis: A group of young boys (plus a token girl and her little brother, the obligatory brat) form a detective club, pooling their talents for brain, brawn, invention, and driving skills to solve crimes in Tokyo. Much to the consternation of police chief Nakamura, they often succeed where the professionals fail. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Dr. Fabre is a Detective
titleNative: ファーブル先生は名探偵
synopsis: The world of insects is full of enchantment and amazement. This animation series is inspired by "the Diary of Insects" written by Jean Henri Fabre, an outstanding French entomologist and author in the 19th Century. In his original works, Mr. Fabre vividly described the life of insects. In this series all the insects and bugs have been personified and drawn into marvelous animated characters. This is the story of the exciting adventures of a crime-buster in the world of insects! Our hero's way of investigation is so unique and always ends with surprising solutions. The interesting ecology of various insects will be described while our 'cool' hero, Inspector Fabre, analyzes and unties the knots of crimes and conspiracy a la fashion of Sherlock Holmes!

tags.name: Detective
tags.description: Features a character who investigates and solves crimes.

title: Pen to Wappa to Jijitsukon
synonyms: A Pen, Handcuffs, and a Common-Law Marriage
synopsis: Forty-year-old detective Eiji Kirisame has found maybe the strangest witness of his life: a silent high school girl named Tsugumi Kuchinashi who was at the scene of the crime. Her statements mostly consist of shoddy doodles on a drawing pad, but Eiji is no stranger to piecing together the truth from limited evidence. He'll take every page seriously if it might help solve the case. But why does the last page say... "Will you marry me?! " (Source: Yen Press)

title: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
titleRomaji: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
synonyms: A Beginner with the Mightiest Account
It Starts with a Kingpin Account
There is a King Account at the Start
Start to Have the King Account
synopsis: The sudden crisis brought the earth directly into the OL era, and all mankind was under the influence of mysterious forces. Everyone became a level-one newbie. In this cruel dog-eat-dog world, the high school student Ye Hao could only rise to level three. When he was about to die, he accidentally triggered the king's account upgrade system, can Ye Hao become the strongest king? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: Private Eye Dol
titleNative: プライベート・アイ・ドル
synopsis: Concurrent with an ADV game by HuneX/NEC-HE, the title is a pun about its detective and idol protagonist. It was released on issues 1 to 3 of NEC's Anime Freak FX, a CD-ROM magazine resembling a game for the PC-FX platform. The hacker Idol King is targeting idols, exposing awkward scenes of their private lives. Now, the next is the popular May Star...

When there is a mystery to solve, she transforms into the clever Nazotoki-hime (literally, Princess Mystery Time). (Source: Anime News Network) Note: The episodes were included in "Ciao Ciao TV! (ちゃおちゃおTV!)", a bonus DVD bundled in select issues of the shoujo magazine Ciao.

title: Serenade
synopsis: A cannibalized egg as man's pet ate a woman at a bar at night or an old man who plays the violin, egg grows bigger day by day. (Source: Yamamura Animation)

title: Jing Wei Wu Jian
synopsis: Adapted from the JJWXC novel ‘Jing Wei Qing Shang’ by Qing Jun Mo Xiao/Please Don’t Laugh, this is a romantic story about two incredible young women. Legend says that the land was once separated by the Luo river. To the south was the agricultural Wei kingdom, and to the north, the nomadic Jing kingdom. Agula, a Princess of the Jing kingdom, had to become a Prince since birth so that her loving parents could stay together. Nangong Jingnu, a Princess of the Wei kingdom, was meant to live a carefree life, but the political struggles of the court made it necessary for her to follow the footsteps of her father. After a war turned Agula into an orphan, she went into hiding for ten years, honing her skills in order to infiltrate the Wei kingdom as a sycophantic official and bring chaos to the world. However, due to a series of events, she was appointed to be Nangong Jingnu’s husband at the Qionglin banquet…
